entries.title: About the Course
entries.content: Continue building an artistic toolbox to create hand-lettered art. Students learn to make banners, frames, and borders and practice a variety of lettering styles, including retro, faceted, vintage circus, bubble, ribbon styles, and more. Skills can be used to create beautiful collections of mottoes and quotes in a Commonplace Book or for display or gifts.

rows.label: Lettering: Level 2
rows.books: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

entries.content:
Permission to print for non-commercial use. See Alveary group use policy to use lessons
in a group context.

LINKS: Click text or scan the QR code in the top corner of the lesson plan pages to view
online resources associated with the lessons.

Responsibility for previewing all links rests with the teacher. All links were checked at the
time of publication; however, websites change frequently and may contain objectionable
content. Please report broken links by contacting us through our website.

Lettering: Level 2
☐ Be sure to have all necessary supplies available for each lesson.

books.title: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

blocks.text: Have the students spend a few minutes warming up by practicing large arm movements on the chalkboard and drawing a few strokes they have already learned.
Look at the new stroke or letter together. Allow the students to articulate what they notice. How will they achieve the desired look?

Students should practice with a small piece of chalk (on its side) on the chalkboard first so that erasing is easy. Then have students practice the new stroke, letter, or letter combination with pen and paper. They should practice until they have six perfect examples before moving on to the next stroke.
Have the students self-evaluate. They may circle their best examples or reflect on which parts were done well and which ones need more practice.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 1
lessons.body:
Faceted Style
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial and refresh your memory about your tools.
∞ Video Link: Lettering 2: Faceted Style

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Faceted Style" Ch.4 p.40-41

➜ PRACTICE
Follow the steps in the book, incorporating tips from the tutorial. Begin working through the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9. This will take two weeks to complete.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 2
lessons.body:
Faceted Style (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ STUDY
Observe closely the example letters and numbers on p.41.

➜ PRACTICE
Finish drawing the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9 in the faceted style. If you finish early, practice drawing your name in the faceted style.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 3
lessons.body:
Vintage Circus Style
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial.
∞ Video Link: Lettering 2: Vintage Circus Style

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Vintage Circus Style" Ch.4 p.42-43

➜ PRACTICE
Follow the steps in the book, incorporating tips from the tutorial. Begin working through the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9. This will take three weeks to complete.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 4
lessons.body:
Vintage Circus Style (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ STUDY
Observe closely the example letters and numbers on p.43.

➜ PRACTICE
Continue drawing the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9 in the vintage circus style.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 5
lessons.body:
Vintage Circus Style (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ RECAP
Talk about the characteristics of the vintage circus lettering style.

➜ PRACTICE
Finish drawing the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9 in the vintage circus style. When you finish, try drawing a quote in this style.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 6
lessons.body:
Bubble Style
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial.
∞ Video Link: Lettering 2: Bubble Style

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Bubble Style" Ch.4 p.44-45

➜ PRACTICE 
Follow the steps in the book, incorporating tips from the tutorial. Begin working through the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9. You will have two weeks to complete.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 7
lessons.body:
Bubble Style (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ RECAP
Observe closely the example letters and numbers on p.45. Talk about the characteristics of the bubble lettering style.

➜ PRACTICE
Finish drawing the letters of the alphabet and the numbers 0-9 in the bubble style. Work on the lower case letters as well.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 8
lessons.body:
Banners
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial.
∞ Video Link: Lettering 2: Banners

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Banners" Ch.5 p.61-69

➜ PRACTICE 
Follow the steps in the book, incorporating tips from the tutorial. Begin working through the different banner types.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 9
lessons.body:
Banners (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ RECAP
Observe closely the example banners on pages 61-69. Talk about the characteristics of the many banner styles.

➜ PRACTICE
Finish drawing all of the different banner types in Ch.5.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 10
lessons.body:
Project #1 
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering, watercolors, brushes, Art Book

➜ DEMONSTRATE
Draw your favorite quote from this term using one of the lettering styles and banners you have learned during the past 9 weeks. You may also incorporate styles that you learned in Level 1. You will have two weeks to complete this project.

➜ DRAW
Do this project in your Art Book using watercolors and brush.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 11
lessons.body:
Project #1 (cont.) 
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering, watercolors, brushes, Art Book

➜ DEMONSTRATE
Finish the quote that you began last week. Be sure to focus on the overall composition of your work.

➜ EVALUATE
Think about the colors that you are using for your composition. Also, be mindful of your baselines.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 12
lessons.body:
Exam Week  

➜ EXAMS
Answer question(s) related to course.

Questions will come from: 
Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 21
lessons.body:
Frames & Borders
⍞ Materials:The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial.

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS

➜ PRACTICE
Follow the steps in the book, incorporating tips from the tutorial. Begin working through the different types of frames and borders. Be creative and make your own.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 22
lessons.body:
Project #2
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering, Art supplies

➜ DEMONSTRATE
Using the letters you have learned this term and all of the things you have learned in lettering to this point, create a gift for a loved one. Use pastel, watercolor, pencil or pen.

➜ DRAW
You have two weeks to work on this project.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 23
lessons.body:
Project #2 (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering, Art supplies

➜ DRAW
Continue working on your project. You should finish it today.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 34
lessons.body:
Project #3
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering, Art supplies

➜ DEMONSTRATE
This is your time to shine! Choose a stanza from a favorite poem to demonstrate your understanding of the different letter styles. Design a composition, focusing on your baselines and lettering styles. Use any medium to complete this project.

➜ DRAW
You will have two weeks to complete this project.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 35
lessons.body:
Project #3 (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ DRAW
Use today to finish project #3. Remember to craft your letters carefully.

lessons.title: 20m Lettering: Level 2 - Lesson 36
lessons.body:
Exam Week  

➜ EXAMS
Answer question(s) related to course.

Questions will come from: 
Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

terms.content:
· Show your project #1 to an adult.

· Demonstrate one lettering style from this term and explain it to an adult.

· Show your project #2 to an adult.

· Demonstrate one lettering style from this term and explain it to an adult.

· Show your project #3 to an adult.

· Demonstrate one lettering style from this term and explain it to an adult.
